title: [CODEREVIEW-6] board.yml cpuclusters structure may prevent board registration
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/board.yml:6 - cpuclusters list with nested variants using name esp32s3_procpu does not follow standard board.yml pattern (see zephyr/boards/luatos/esp32s3_luatos_core/board.yml or nordic/nrf5340dk/board.yml which use variants: list with cpucluster field). Causes 'west boards' to omit elecrow_thinknode_m7. P1 correctness. Also missing vendor: elecrow.
